title: 10 best herbal teas for phlegm
description: Roselle teas helps with phlegm because of its natural expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear out mucus and congestion from the body. The tea's ant-inflammatory compounds also reduce inflammation in the throat and lungs, making it easier for the body to expel phlegm and other irritants.
